name: The A2 Milk Company Limited
analysis: A2M has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$7.1000, stop A$5.1579, target A$8.5572 (0.75:1) — then trail it.
